name: @dropbox/dropbox
description: Upload, download, and manage files and folders in Dropbox cloud storage. Create, move, copy, and delete files and folders. Search files by name or content. Share files and folders via shared links with configurable access settings. Manage shared folder membership, create file requests for document collection, generate temporary links and thumbnails, use upload sessions for chunked uploads, view and restore file revisions, retrieve account quota information, and receive file-change notifications.
